message:
Update from parallel agent work

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2qg.1.3","title":"Decision: Threaded renderer parity requirement","description":"Background:
- FEATURE_PARITY.md lists threaded renderer as missing; Zig has render thread support. Rust Renderer is single-threaded and !Send due to stdout ownership.

Goal:
- Decide whether threaded rendering is a required parity feature for this port.

Acceptance criteria:
- Decision recorded with desired API shape (if required), performance rationale, and constraints (Terminal cleanup on thread exit, sync-output correctness).
- Explicit go/no-go so downstream implementation tasks are unblocked.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:37:07.521726565Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T05:05:35.834448268Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T05:05:35.834429763Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:37:07.521726565Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qg.10","title":"Build legacy reference capture harness for conformance fixtures","description":"Background:
- Current conformance fixtures are static and not reproducibly generated.
- We need a legacy capture tool to establish an authoritative source of truth.

Goal:
- Create a deterministic capture harness against legacy OpenTUI that writes the canonical fixtures JSON.
- Record legacy version/commit and exact commands so future runs are reproducible.

Acceptance criteria:
- A capture tool exists, documented, and produces fixtures consumed by tests/conformance.rs without manual edits.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:03:07.744072415Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:57.760103797Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.10","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:03:07.744072415Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.10","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:04:45.348296503Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":11,"issue_id":"bd-2qg.10","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Purpose: make conformance fixtures reproducible by providing a legacy capture tool.
Without this, fixtures are opaque and parity claims are weaker.
This bead establishes the capture pipeline and documentation.","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:43:05Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qg.10.1","title":"Define fixture schema + categories for legacy capture","description":"Scope:
- Specify JSON schema for fixtures (crate/version/captured_at + tests[]).
- Enumerate required categories: color, buffer, text, input, ansi, unicode, plus new grapheme cases.

Acceptance criteria:
- Schema documented and aligns with tests/conformance.rs expectations.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:40:16.093856338Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T04:49:43.046677812Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T04:49:43.046659548Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.10.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:40:16.093856338Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"bd-2qg.10.2","title":"Implement capture CLI in legacy_opentui (deterministic output)","description":"Scope:
- Implement a minimal legacy capture program that runs the core API tests and writes fixtures.
- Pin the legacy commit/hash used for capture; include the exact command.

Acceptance criteria:
- Capture CLI is reproducible, deterministic, and produces fixtures that the Rust conformance tests can consume.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:40:23.039805707Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T05:20:52.031854372Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.10.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:40:23.039805707Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.10.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.10.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:25.410325396Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"bd-2qg.10.2","title":"Implement capture CLI in legacy_opentui (deterministic output)","description":"Scope:
- Implement a minimal legacy capture program that runs the core API tests and writes fixtures.
- Pin the legacy commit/hash used for capture; include the exact command.

Acceptance criteria:
- Capture CLI is reproducible, deterministic, and produces fixtures that the Rust conformance tests can consume.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:40:23.039805707Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T06:43:57.032410733Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T06:43:57.032170781Z","close_reason":"Implemented legacy capture CLI, built zig lib with Zig 0.15.2, ran capture with --lib-path","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.10.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:40:23.039805707Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.10.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.10.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:25.410325396Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qg.10.3","title":"Doc: how to regenerate fixtures from legacy","description":"Scope:
- Document the precise steps and commands to regenerate fixtures (including legacy version).

Acceptance criteria:
- A future maintainer can re-run the capture without reading any other docs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:40:29.640437944Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:33.768301768Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.10.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:40:29.640437944Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.10.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.10.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:33.767661430Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qg.11","title":"Regenerate conformance fixtures from legacy and update expectations","description":"Use the new legacy capture harness to regenerate fixtures and verify that Rust outputs match. Add workflow notes (exact commands, legacy commit hash). If discrepancies appear, resolve by updating Rust implementation or documenting intentional divergence. Keep fixtures deterministic and stable across runs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:03:19.520656435Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:43:11.924062447Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.11","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:03:19.520656435Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.11","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:04:50.627096948Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.11","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:04:55.328658684Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.11","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:05:00.582561375Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":12,"issue_id":"bd-2qg.11","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Purpose: regenerate fixtures from the legacy capture and reconcile differences.
Any mismatches must be resolved via Rust fixes or explicit, documented divergence.
End state: fixtures reflect authoritative legacy behavior and Rust matches.","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:43:11Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qg.11.1","title":"Run legacy capture and diff fixtures","description":"Scope:
- Execute capture harness; diff generated fixtures vs current.
- Record deltas and categorize (Rust bug vs fixture update).

Acceptance criteria:
- A diff report is recorded and used to drive fixes.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:40:38.790589247Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:40:38.790589247Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qg.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2qg.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:40:38.790589247Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+# Implementation Report - Rust Tokenizer
+
+**Date:** January 24, 2026
+**Agent:** Gemini CLI
+
+## Summary
+Successfully implemented the Rust tokenizer for the syntax highlighting system (`bd-2x0.4`). This adds support for tokenizing Rust source code, including keywords, literals (strings, raw strings, numbers, chars), comments, and attributes.
+
+## Changes
+1.  **New File:** `src/highlight/languages/rust.rs` - Contains the `RustTokenizer` implementation.
+2.  **New File:** `src/highlight/languages/mod.rs` - Module export.
+3.  **Modified:** `src/highlight/mod.rs` - Added `pub mod languages;`.
+4.  **Modified:** `src/highlight/tokenizer.rs` - Updated `TokenizerRegistry::with_builtins()` to register `RustTokenizer`.
+
+## Environment & Triage Notes
+- **Critical Issue:** The `run_shell_command` tool fails with Signal 1 (SIGHUP) and empty output. This prevents running tests, linters, or the `bv` issue tracker CLI.
+- **Issue Tracker Discrepancy:** Several tasks marked as "open" in `.beads/issues.jsonl` were found to be **already implemented** in the codebase:
+    - `bd-1qe` (Terminal Cursor Save/Restore): Implemented in `src/terminal/mod.rs`.
+    - `bd-1ms` (Word Movement/Deletion): Implemented in `src/text/edit.rs`.
+    - `bd-gtp` (Line Duplication): Implemented in `src/text/edit.rs`.
+    - `bd-1tl` (Visual Navigation): Implemented in `src/text/editor.rs`.
+    - `bd-219` (Bracketed Paste Bug): Fix present in `src/input/parser.rs`.
+
+## Next Steps
+- **Verification:** Once the shell environment is fixed, run `cargo test` to verify the new tokenizer.
+- **Integration:** Proceed with `bd-2x0.10` to implement `HighlightedBuffer` and integrate it with `EditorView`.
+- **Cleanup:** Update the Beads issue tracker to reflect the actual state of the codebase.
